    impl NetworkMessageS2C {
        pub fn is_block_related(&self) -> bool {
            match self {
                NetworkMessageS2C::LoadChunk { .. }
                | NetworkMessageS2C::UnloadChunk { .. }
                | NetworkMessageS2C::SetBlock { .. }
                | NetworkMessageS2C::UpdateBlockComponents { .. } => true,
                _ => false,
            }
        }
    }
    pub fn make_connection_config() -> ConnectionConfig {
        ConnectionConfig {
            available_bytes_per_tick: 30000,
            server_channels_config: <[_]>::into_vec(
                ::alloc::boxed::box_new([
                    ChannelConfig {
                        channel_id: 0,
                        max_memory_usage_bytes: 1 * 1024 * 1024,
                        send_type: SendType::ReliableOrdered {
                            resend_time: Duration::from_millis(300),
                        },
                    },
                    ChannelConfig {
                        channel_id: 1,
                        max_memory_usage_bytes: 10 * 1024 * 1024,
                        send_type: SendType::ReliableOrdered {
                            resend_time: Duration::from_millis(300),
                        },
                    },
                ]),
            ),
            client_channels_config: <[_]>::into_vec(
                ::alloc::boxed::box_new([
                    ChannelConfig {
                        channel_id: 0,
                        max_memory_usage_bytes: 1 * 1024 * 1024,
                        send_type: SendType::ReliableOrdered {
                            resend_time: Duration::from_millis(300),
                        },
                    },
                ]),
            ),
        }
    }
}
pub mod registry {
    use std::cell::OnceCell;
    use std::collections::HashSet;
    use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
    use std::sync::{Arc, Mutex, MutexGuard, OnceLock};
    use std::{collections::HashMap, hash::Hash, marker::PhantomData, num::NonZero};
    use anyhow::anyhow;
    use image::DynamicImage;
    use image_overlay::overlay_dyn_img;
    use palettevec::PaletteVec;
    use palettevec::index_buffer::AlignedIndexBuffer;
    use palettevec::palette::HybridPalette;
    use ron::extensions::Extensions;
    use serde::de::{DeserializeSeed, Visitor};
    use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
    use walkdir::WalkDir;
    use crate::coord::{AABB, BlockPos, Face, FaceMap, Orientation, Pos, Vec3};
    use crate::model::Model;
    use crate::scripts::{
        CompiledScript, ExternalScriptByteCode, RegisterId, RegisterOrImmediate,
        ScriptLabel, ScriptParseContext, ScriptParseError, expect_argument_count,
    };
    use crate::ui::{UIScreen, UIScreenKey, UIStyleList};
    use crate::{Color, DamageTable, DamageType, InventoryView, LookDirection, ViewSlot};
    use serde_default_utils::*;
    pub struct Key<T>(NonZero<usize>, PhantomData<T>);
    impl<T> Key<T> {
        pub fn numeric_id(self) -> usize {
            self.0.get() - 1
        }
    }
    impl<T> Clone for Key<T> {
        fn clone(&self) -> Self {
            Self(self.0, PhantomData)
        }
    }
    impl<T> Copy for Key<T> {}
    impl<T> PartialEq for Key<T> {
        fn eq(&self, other: &Self) -> bool {
            self.0 == other.0
        }
    }
    impl<T> Eq for Key<T> {}
    impl<T> Hash for Key<T> {
        fn hash<H: std::hash::Hasher>(&self, state: &mut H) {
            self.0.hash(state);
        }
    }
    pub struct LoadRegistry<T> {
        id_map: HashMap<String, Key<T>>,
        data_list: Vec<PathBuf>,
        id_list: Vec<String>,
        group_id_map: HashMap<String, KeyGroup<T>>,
        groups: Vec<(Vec<Key<T>>, HashSet<Key<T>>)>,
    }
    impl<T> Default for LoadRegistry<T> {
        fn default() -> Self {
            Self {
                id_map: Default::default(),
                data_list: Default::default(),
                id_list: Default::default(),
                group_id_map: Default::default(),
                groups: Default::default(),
            }
        }
    }
    impl<T> LoadRegistry<T> {
        fn register(&mut self, id: String, data: PathBuf) -> Key<T> {
            if self.id_map.contains_key(&id) {
                {
                    ::core::panicking::panic_fmt(
                        format_args!("double registration of {0}", id),
                    );
                };
            }
            self.id_list.push(id.clone());
            self.data_list.push(data);
            let key = Key(
                unsafe { NonZero::new_unchecked(self.id_list.len()) },
                PhantomData,
            );
            self.id_map.insert(id, key);
            key
        }
        fn register_group(&mut self, id: String, group: HashSet<Key<T>>) -> KeyGroup<T> {
            self.groups.push((group.iter().cloned().collect(), group));
            let key_group = KeyGroup::Group(self.groups.len() - 1);
            self.group_id_map.insert(id, key_group);
            key_group
        }
    }
    pub struct Registry<T> {
        pub data_list: Vec<T>,
    }
    impl<T: 'static> Serialize for Key<T>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        fn serialize<S>(&self, serializer: S) -> Result<S::Ok, S::Error>
        where
            S: serde::Serializer,
        {
            serializer.serialize_str(self.text_id())
        }
    }
    impl<'de, T: 'static> Deserialize<'de> for Key<T>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        fn deserialize<D>(deserializer: D) -> Result<Self, D::Error>
        where
            D: serde::Deserializer<'de>,
        {
            struct KeyVisitor<T>(PhantomData<T>);
            impl<'de, T: 'static> Visitor<'de> for KeyVisitor<T>
            where
                LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
                RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
            {
                type Value = Key<T>;
                fn expecting(
                    &self,
                    formatter: &mut std::fmt::Formatter,
                ) -> std::fmt::Result {
                    formatter.write_str("valid string key")
                }
                fn visit_str<E>(self, v: &str) -> Result<Self::Value, E>
                where
                    E: serde::de::Error,
                {
                    Key::<T>::id(v)
                        .ok_or_else(|| serde::de::Error::custom(
                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("id {0} not found", v))
                            }),
                        ))
                }
            }
            deserializer.deserialize_str(KeyVisitor::<T>(PhantomData))
        }
    }
    static LOAD_REGISTRIES: OnceLock<LoadRegistryStorage> = OnceLock::new();
    pub static REGISTRIES: OnceLock<RegistryStorage> = OnceLock::new();
    #[allow(non_snake_case)]
    pub struct RegistryStorage {
        block: Registry<BlockData>,
        item: Registry<ItemData>,
        texture: Registry<TextureData>,
        entity: Registry<EntityData>,
        plant: Registry<PlantData>,
        biome: Registry<BiomeData>,
        loot_table: Registry<LootTableData>,
        ui: Registry<UIScreen>,
        ui_style: Registry<UIStyleList>,
        model: Registry<ModelData>,
        language: Registry<TranslationLanguageData>,
        recipe: Registry<RecipeData>,
        structure: Registry<BlockStructureData>,
        research: Registry<ResearchData>,
    }
    pub trait RegistryProvider<T> {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<T>;
    }
    #[allow(non_snake_case)]
    pub struct LoadRegistryStorage {
        block: LoadRegistry<BlockData>,
        item: LoadRegistry<ItemData>,
        texture: LoadRegistry<TextureData>,
        entity: LoadRegistry<EntityData>,
        plant: LoadRegistry<PlantData>,
        biome: LoadRegistry<BiomeData>,
        loot_table: LoadRegistry<LootTableData>,
        ui: LoadRegistry<UIScreen>,
        ui_style: LoadRegistry<UIStyleList>,
        model: LoadRegistry<ModelData>,
        language: LoadRegistry<TranslationLanguageData>,
        recipe: LoadRegistry<RecipeData>,
        structure: LoadRegistry<BlockStructureData>,
        research: LoadRegistry<ResearchData>,
    }
    pub trait LoadRegistryProvider<T> {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<T>;
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<BlockData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<BlockData> {
            &self.block
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<BlockData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<BlockData> {
            &self.block
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<ItemData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<ItemData> {
            &self.item
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<ItemData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<ItemData> {
            &self.item
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<TextureData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<TextureData> {
            &self.texture
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<TextureData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<TextureData> {
            &self.texture
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<EntityData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<EntityData> {
            &self.entity
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<EntityData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<EntityData> {
            &self.entity
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<PlantData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<PlantData> {
            &self.plant
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<PlantData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<PlantData> {
            &self.plant
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<BiomeData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<BiomeData> {
            &self.biome
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<BiomeData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<BiomeData> {
            &self.biome
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<LootTableData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<LootTableData> {
            &self.loot_table
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<LootTableData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<LootTableData> {
            &self.loot_table
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<UIScreen> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<UIScreen> {
            &self.ui
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<UIScreen> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<UIScreen> {
            &self.ui
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<UIStyleList> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<UIStyleList> {
            &self.ui_style
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<UIStyleList> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<UIStyleList> {
            &self.ui_style
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<ModelData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<ModelData> {
            &self.model
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<ModelData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<ModelData> {
            &self.model
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<TranslationLanguageData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<TranslationLanguageData> {
            &self.language
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<TranslationLanguageData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<TranslationLanguageData> {
            &self.language
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<RecipeData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<RecipeData> {
            &self.recipe
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<RecipeData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<RecipeData> {
            &self.recipe
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<BlockStructureData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<BlockStructureData> {
            &self.structure
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<BlockStructureData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<BlockStructureData> {
            &self.structure
        }
    }
    impl RegistryProvider<ResearchData> for RegistryStorage {
        fn get_registry(&self) -> &Registry<ResearchData> {
            &self.research
        }
    }
    impl LoadRegistryProvider<ResearchData> for LoadRegistryStorage {
        fn get_load_registry(&self) -> &LoadRegistry<ResearchData> {
            &self.research
        }
    }
    pub trait RegistryConfigLoadable: Sized {
        fn registry_load_from_config(
            config: &Path,
            key: Key<Self>,
        ) -> anyhow::Result<Self>;
    }
    pub fn load_registries(asset_paths: &[&Path]) {
        let mut load_registry = LoadRegistryStorage {
            block: LoadRegistry::default(),
            item: LoadRegistry::default(),
            texture: LoadRegistry::default(),
            entity: LoadRegistry::default(),
            plant: LoadRegistry::default(),
            biome: LoadRegistry::default(),
            loot_table: LoadRegistry::default(),
            ui: LoadRegistry::default(),
            ui_style: LoadRegistry::default(),
            model: LoadRegistry::default(),
            language: LoadRegistry::default(),
            recipe: LoadRegistry::default(),
            structure: LoadRegistry::default(),
            research: LoadRegistry::default(),
        };
        let mut encountered_error = false;
        {
            let mut groups = HashMap::new();
            for asset_path in asset_paths {
                let base_asset_path = asset_path.join("block");
                for entry in WalkDir::new(&base_asset_path) {
                    match entry {
                        Ok(entry) => {
                            if entry.file_type().is_file() {
                                let stripped_path = entry
                                    .path()
                                    .strip_prefix(&base_asset_path)
                                    .unwrap();
                                let extension = stripped_path.extension();
                                match stripped_path
                                    .extension()
                                    .and_then(|ext| ext.to_str())
                                    .unwrap_or("")
                                {
                                    "py" => continue,
                                    _ => {}
                                }
                                let id = stripped_path
                                    .with_extension("")
                                    .as_os_str()
                                    .to_string_lossy()
                                    .replace("/", ".")
                                    .replace("\\", ".");
                                if id.starts_with("#") {
                                    *groups
                                        .entry(id[1..].to_string())
                                        .or_insert_with(|| String::new())
                                        += ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                    format_args!(
                                                        "\n{0}",
                                                        std::fs::read_to_string(entry.into_path()).unwrap(),
                                                    ),
                                                )
                                            })
                                            .as_str();
                                } else {
                                    load_registry.block.register(id, entry.into_path());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        Err(_) => {}
                    }
                }
            }
            for id in groups.keys() {
                let mut entries = HashSet::new();
                fn recursively_load(
                    registry: &LoadRegistry<BlockData>,
                    groups: &HashMap<String, String>,
                    entries: &mut HashSet<Key<BlockData>>,
                    id: &str,
                    encountered_error: &mut bool,
                ) {
                    for line in groups.get(id).unwrap().lines() {
                        if line.is_empty() {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if line.starts_with("#") {
                            recursively_load(
                                registry,
                                groups,
                                entries,
                                &line[1..],
                                encountered_error,
                            );
                        } else {
                            match registry.id_map.get(line).cloned() {
                                Some(id) => {
                                    entries.insert(id);
                                }
                                None => {
                                    {
                                        ::std::io::_eprint(
                                            format_args!(
                                                "error loading {0} tag {1} - {2} not found\n",
                                                "block",
                                                id,
                                                line,
                                            ),
                                        );
                                    };
                                    *encountered_error = true;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                recursively_load(
                    &load_registry.block,
                    &groups,
                    &mut entries,
                    &id,
                    &mut encountered_error,
                );
                load_registry.block.register_group(id.to_string(), entries);
            }
        }
        {
            let mut groups = HashMap::new();
            for asset_path in asset_paths {
                let base_asset_path = asset_path.join("item");
                for entry in WalkDir::new(&base_asset_path) {
                    match entry {
                        Ok(entry) => {
                            if entry.file_type().is_file() {
                                let stripped_path = entry
                                    .path()
                                    .strip_prefix(&base_asset_path)
                                    .unwrap();
                                let extension = stripped_path.extension();
                                match stripped_path
                                    .extension()
                                    .and_then(|ext| ext.to_str())
                                    .unwrap_or("")
                                {
                                    "py" => continue,
                                    _ => {}
                                }
                                let id = stripped_path
                                    .with_extension("")
                                    .as_os_str()
                                    .to_string_lossy()
                                    .replace("/", ".")
                                    .replace("\\", ".");
                                if id.starts_with("#") {
                                    *groups
                                        .entry(id[1..].to_string())
                                        .or_insert_with(|| String::new())
                                        += ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                    format_args!(
                                                        "\n{0}",
                                                        std::fs::read_to_string(entry.into_path()).unwrap(),
                                                    ),
                                                )
                                            })
                                            .as_str();
                                } else {
                                    load_registry.item.register(id, entry.into_path());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        Err(_) => {}
                    }
                }
            }
            for id in groups.keys() {
                let mut entries = HashSet::new();
                fn recursively_load(
                    registry: &LoadRegistry<ItemData>,
                    groups: &HashMap<String, String>,
                    entries: &mut HashSet<Key<ItemData>>,
                    id: &str,
                    encountered_error: &mut bool,
                ) {
                    for line in groups.get(id).unwrap().lines() {
                        if line.is_empty() {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if line.starts_with("#") {
                            recursively_load(
                                registry,
                                groups,
                                entries,
                                &line[1..],
                                encountered_error,
                            );
                        } else {
                            match registry.id_map.get(line).cloned() {
                                Some(id) => {
                                    entries.insert(id);
                                }
                                None => {
                                    {
                                        ::std::io::_eprint(
                                            format_args!(
                                                "error loading {0} tag {1} - {2} not found\n",
                                                "item",
                                                id,
                                                line,
                                            ),
                                        );
                                    };
                                    *encountered_error = true;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                recursively_load(
                    &load_registry.item,
                    &groups,
                    &mut entries,
                    &id,
                    &mut encountered_error,
                );
                load_registry.item.register_group(id.to_string(), entries);
            }
        }
        {

                            }

                }

                                    entries.insert(id);
                                }
                                None => {
                                    {
                                        ::std::io::_eprint(
                                            format_args!(
                                                "error loading {0} tag {1} - {2} not found\n",
                                                "texture",
                                                id,
                                                line,
                                            ),
                                        );
                                    };
                                    *encountered_error = true;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                recursively_load(
                    &load_registry.texture,
                    &groups,
                    &mut entries,
                    &id,
                    &mut encountered_error,
                );
                load_registry.texture.register_group(id.to_string(), entries);
            }
        }

            for id in groups.keys() {
                let mut entries = HashSet::new();
                fn recursively_load(
                    registry: &LoadRegistry<ModelData>,
                    groups: &HashMap<String, String>,
                    entries: &mut HashSet<Key<ModelData>>,
                    id: &str,
                    encountered_error: &mut bool,
                ) {
                    for line in groups.get(id).unwrap().lines() {
                        if line.is_empty() {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if line.starts_with("#") {
                            recursively_load(
                                registry,
                                groups,
                                entries,
                                &line[1..],
                                encountered_error,
                            );
                        } else {
                            match registry.id_map.get(line).cloned() {
                                Some(id) => {
                                    entries.insert(id);
                                }
                                None => {
                                    {
                                        ::std::io::_eprint(
                                            format_args!(
                                                "error loading {0} tag {1} - {2} not found\n",
                                                "model",
                                                id,
                                                line,
                                            ),
                                        );
                                    };
                                    *encountered_error = true;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                recursively_load(
                    &load_registry.model,
                    &groups,
                    &mut entries,
                    &id,
                    &mut encountered_error,
                );
                load_registry.model.register_group(id.to_string(), entries);
            }
        }
        {
            let mut groups = HashMap::new();
            for asset_path in asset_paths {
                let base_asset_path = asset_path.join("language");
                for entry in WalkDir::new(&base_asset_path) {
                    match entry {
                        Ok(entry) => {
                            if entry.file_type().is_file() {
                                let stripped_path = entry
                                    .path()
                                    .strip_prefix(&base_asset_path)
                                    .unwrap();
                                let extension = stripped_path.extension();
                                match stripped_path
                                    .extension()
                                    .and_then(|ext| ext.to_str())
                                    .unwrap_or("")
                                {
                                    "py" => continue,
                                    _ => {}
                                }
                                let id = stripped_path
                                    .with_extension("")
                                    .as_os_str()
                                    .to_string_lossy()
                                    .replace("/", ".")
                                    .replace("\\", ".");
                                if id.starts_with("#") {
                                    *groups
                                        .entry(id[1..].to_string())
                                        .or_insert_with(|| String::new())
                                        += ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                    format_args!(
                                                        "\n{0}",
                                                        std::fs::read_to_string(entry.into_path()).unwrap(),
                                                    ),
                                                )
                                            })
                                            .as_str();
                                } else {
                                    load_registry.language.register(id, entry.into_path());
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        Err(_) => {}
                    }
                }
            }
            for id in groups.keys() {
                let mut entries = HashSet::new();
                fn recursively_load(
                    registry: &LoadRegistry<TranslationLanguageData>,
                    groups: &HashMap<String, String>,
                    entries: &mut HashSet<Key<TranslationLanguageData>>,
                    id: &str,
                    encountered_error: &mut bool,
                ) {
                    for line in groups.get(id).unwrap().lines() {
                        if line.is_empty() {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if line.starts_with("#") {
                            recursively_load(
                                registry,
                                groups,
                                entries,
                                &line[1..],
                                encountered_error,
                            );
                        } else {
                            match registry.id_map.get(line).cloned() {
                                Some(id) => {
                                    entries.insert(id);
                                }
                                None => {
                                    {
                                        ::std::io::_eprint(
                                            format_args!(
                                                "error loading {0} tag {1} - {2} not found\n",
                                                "language",
                                                id,
                                                line,
                                            ),
                                        );
                                    };
                                    *encountered_error = true;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                recursively_load(
                    &load_registry.language,
                    &groups,
                    &mut entries,
                    &id,
                    &mut encountered_error,
                );
                load_registry.language.register_group(id.to_string(), entries);
            }
        }

        LOAD_REGISTRIES.set(load_registry).ok().unwrap();
        let load_registry = LOAD_REGISTRIES.get().unwrap();
        let registries = RegistryStorage {
            block: {
                let load_registry = &load_registry.block;
                let mut data_list = Vec::with_capacity(load_registry.data_list.len());
                for (i, data) in load_registry.data_list.iter().enumerate() {
                    match <BlockData as RegistryConfigLoadable>::registry_load_from_config(
                        &data,
                        Key(unsafe { NonZero::new_unchecked(i + 1) }, PhantomData),
                    ) {
                        Ok(data) => {
                            data_list.push(data);
                        }
                        Err(error) => {
                            {
                                ::std::io::_eprint(
                                    format_args!(
                                        "error loading {0} {1} - {2}\n",
                                        "block",
                                        load_registry.id_list[i],
                                        error,
                                    ),
                                );
                            };
                            encountered_error = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
                Registry { data_list }
            },
            item: {
                let load_registry = &load_registry.item;
                let mut data_list = Vec::with_capacity(load_registry.data_list.len());
                for (i, data) in load_registry.data_list.iter().enumerate() {
                    match <ItemData as RegistryConfigLoadable>::registry_load_from_config(
                        &data,
                        Key(unsafe { NonZero::new_unchecked(i + 1) }, PhantomData),

                                    format_args!(
                                        "error loading {0} {1} - {2}\n",
                                        "item",
                                        load_registry.id_list[i],
                                        error,
                                    ),
                                );
                            };
                            encountered_error = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
                Registry { data_list }
            },
            texture: {

                                        "research",
                                        load_registry.id_list[i],
                                        error,
                                    ),
                                );
                            };
                            encountered_error = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
                Registry { data_list }
            },
        };
        if encountered_error {
            {
                ::std::io::_eprint(
                    format_args!("Error encountered while loading registries, exiting\n"),
                );
            };
            std::process::exit(0);
        }
        REGISTRIES.set(registries).ok().unwrap();
    }
    impl<T: 'static> Key<T>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        pub fn data(self) -> &'static T {
            &REGISTRIES.get().unwrap().get_registry().data_list[self.numeric_id()]
        }
        pub fn text_id(self) -> &'static str {
            LOAD_REGISTRIES
                .get()
                .unwrap()
                .get_load_registry()
                .id_list[self.numeric_id()]
                .as_str()
        }
        pub fn id(id: &str) -> Option<Self> {
            LOAD_REGISTRIES.get().unwrap().get_load_registry().id_map.get(id).cloned()
        }
        pub fn path(self) -> &'static Path {
            LOAD_REGISTRIES
                .get()
                .unwrap()
                .get_load_registry()
                .data_list[self.numeric_id()]
                .as_path()
        }
        pub fn entries() -> impl Iterator<Item = Self> {
            let load_registry = LOAD_REGISTRIES.get().unwrap().get_load_registry();
            (0..load_registry.data_list.len())
                .map(|i| Key(unsafe { NonZero::new_unchecked(i + 1) }, PhantomData))
        }
    }
    impl<T: for<'de> Deserialize<'de>> RegistryConfigLoadable for T {
        fn registry_load_from_config(
            config: &Path,
            key: Key<Self>,
        ) -> anyhow::Result<Self> {
            let data = std::fs::read_to_string(config).unwrap();
            ron::Options::default()
                .with_default_extension(Extensions::IMPLICIT_SOME)
                .from_str::<T>(&data)
                .map_err(|error| ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                    ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                        ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("{0}", error))
                    }),
                ))
        }
    }
    pub enum OwnOrKey<T: 'static>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        Own(T),
        Key(Key<T>),
    }

    impl<T: 'static> OwnOrKey<T>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        pub fn data(&self) -> &T {
            match self {
                OwnOrKey::Own(data) => &data,
                OwnOrKey::Key(key) => key.data(),

    pub enum KeyGroup<T> {
        Single(Key<T>),
        Group(usize),
    }
    impl<T: 'static> KeyGroup<T>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        pub fn parse(id: &str) -> Option<Self> {
            if id.starts_with("#") {
                LOAD_REGISTRIES
                    .get()
                    .unwrap()
                    .get_load_registry()
                    .group_id_map
                    .get(&id[1..])
                    .cloned()
            } else {
                Some(KeyGroup::Single(Key::<T>::id(id)?))
            }
        }
        pub fn contains(self, key: Key<T>) -> bool {
            match self {
                KeyGroup::Single(v) => v == key,
                KeyGroup::Group(group) => {
                    let (_, group) = &LOAD_REGISTRIES
                        .get()
                        .unwrap()
                        .get_load_registry()
                        .groups[group];
                    group.contains(&key)
                }
            }
        }
        pub fn list(&self) -> &[Key<T>] {
            match self {
                KeyGroup::Single(key) => std::slice::from_ref(key),
                KeyGroup::Group(group) => {
                    let (group, _) = &LOAD_REGISTRIES
                        .get()
                        .unwrap()
                        .get_load_registry()
                        .groups[*group];
                    &group[..]
                }
            }
        }
    }
    impl<T> Copy for KeyGroup<T> {}
    impl<T> Clone for KeyGroup<T> {
        fn clone(&self) -> Self {
            match self {
                Self::Single(v) => Self::Single(*v),
                Self::Group(v) => Self::Group(*v),
            }
        }
    }
    impl<T> PartialEq for KeyGroup<T> {
        fn eq(&self, other: &Self) -> bool {
            match (self, other) {
                (Self::Single(l0), Self::Single(r0)) => l0 == r0,
                (Self::Group(l0), Self::Group(r0)) => l0 == r0,
                _ => false,
            }
        }
    }
    impl<T> Eq for KeyGroup<T> {}
    impl<T> Hash for KeyGroup<T> {
        fn hash<H: std::hash::Hasher>(&self, state: &mut H) {
            core::mem::discriminant(self).hash(state);
            match self {
                KeyGroup::Single(key) => key.hash(state),
                KeyGroup::Group(i) => i.hash(state),
            }
        }
    }
    impl<'de, T: 'static> Deserialize<'de> for KeyGroup<T>
    where
        LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
        RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
    {
        fn deserialize<D>(deserializer: D) -> Result<Self, D::Error>
        where
            D: serde::Deserializer<'de>,
        {
            struct KeyVisitor<T>(PhantomData<T>);
            impl<'de, T: 'static> Visitor<'de> for KeyVisitor<T>
            where
                LoadRegistryStorage: LoadRegistryProvider<T>,
                RegistryStorage: RegistryProvider<T>,
            {
                type Value = KeyGroup<T>;
                fn expecting(
                    &self,
                    formatter: &mut std::fmt::Formatter,
                ) -> std::fmt::Result {
                    formatter.write_str("valid string key")
                }
                fn visit_str<E>(self, v: &str) -> Result<Self::Value, E>
                where
                    E: serde::de::Error,
                {
                    match KeyGroup::parse(v) {
                        Some(group) => Ok(group),
                        None => {
                            Err(
                                serde::de::Error::custom(
                                    ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                        ::alloc::fmt::format(format_args!("group {0} not found", v))
                                    }),
                                ),
                            )
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            deserializer.deserialize_str(KeyVisitor::<T>(PhantomData))
        }
    }
    static AIR_BLOCK: OnceLock<BlockKey> = OnceLock::new();
    pub fn air_block() -> BlockKey {
        *AIR_BLOCK.get_or_init(|| BlockKey::id("air").unwrap())
    }

    pub enum ItemAction {
        Ignore,
        Place(Vec<ItemBlockPlacement>),
        SpawnEntity(EntityKey),
        Plant(PlantKey),
    }

                __deserializer: __D,

    impl ItemAction {
        pub fn variation_count(&self) -> usize {
            match self {
                ItemAction::Ignore
                | ItemAction::SpawnEntity(_)
                | ItemAction::Plant(_) => 1,
                ItemAction::Place(item_block_placements) => item_block_placements.len(),
            }
        }

    fn full_aabb() -> Vec<crate::coord::AABB<f32>> {
        <[_]>::into_vec(
            ::alloc::boxed::box_new([
                crate::coord::AABB {
                    min: Pos { x: 0., y: 0., z: 0. },
                    max: Pos { x: 1., y: 1., z: 1. },
                },
            ]),
        )
    }

        #[serde(default)]

        pub rotation: BlockRotationMode,
        #[serde(default = "default_item_scale")]
        pub item_scale: f32,
    }

    pub enum BlockRotationMode {

        Horizontal,
        Full,
        FullOriented,

    impl BlockRotationMode {
        pub fn from_look_direction(self, direction: LookDirection) -> BlockRotation {
            fn closest_face_to_offset(offset: Pos, enable_vertical: bool) -> Face {
                let face_fitness = |face: Face| -> f32 {
                    let face_offset = face.get_offset();
                    (offset.x * face_offset.x) + (offset.y * face_offset.y)
                        + (offset.z * face_offset.z)
                };
                *Face::all()
                    .iter()
                    .filter(|face| enable_vertical || face.get_block_offset().y == 0)
                    .max_by(|face1, face2| {
                        face_fitness(**face1).total_cmp(&face_fitness(**face2))
                    })
                    .unwrap()
            }
            let orientation = match self {
                BlockRotationMode::None => Orientation::IDENTITY,
                BlockRotationMode::Horizontal => {
                    let face = closest_face_to_offset(direction.make_front(), false);
                    Orientation::from_front_right(face, face.cross(Face::Up))
                        .unwrap_or(Orientation::IDENTITY)
                }
                BlockRotationMode::Full => {
                    let face = closest_face_to_offset(direction.make_front(), true);
                    Orientation::from_front_right(
                            face,
                            face
                                .cross(
                                    if face.get_block_offset().y == 0 {
                                        Face::Up
                                    } else {
                                        Face::Front
                                    },
                                ),
                        )
                        .unwrap_or(Orientation::IDENTITY)
                }
                BlockRotationMode::FullOriented => {
                    Orientation::from_front_right(
                            closest_face_to_offset(direction.make_front(), true),
                            closest_face_to_offset(direction.make_right(), true),
                        )
                        .unwrap_or(Orientation::IDENTITY)
                }
            };
            orientation.into()
        }
        pub fn get_nearest_valid(self, value: BlockRotation) -> BlockRotation {
            match self {
                BlockRotationMode::None => BlockRotation::default(),
                BlockRotationMode::Horizontal => {
                    match Into::<Orientation>::into(value).forward {
                        Face::Up | Face::Down => {
                            Orientation::from_front_up(Face::Front, Face::Up).unwrap()
                        }
                        front => Orientation::from_front_up(front, Face::Up).unwrap(),
                    }
                        .into()
                }
                BlockRotationMode::Full => {
                    match Into::<Orientation>::into(value).forward {
                        Face::Up => {
                            Orientation::from_front_up(Face::Up, Face::Back).unwrap()
                        }
                        Face::Down => {
                            Orientation::from_front_up(Face::Down, Face::Front).unwrap()
                        }
                        front => Orientation::from_front_up(front, Face::Up).unwrap(),
                    }
                        .into()
                }
                BlockRotationMode::FullOriented => value,
            }
        }
    }
    impl Default for BlockRotationMode {
        fn default() -> Self {
            BlockRotationMode::None
        }
    }

    pub enum MachineInstrution {
        Next,
        Sleep { time: f32 },
        Suspend,
        TranferItem { self_view: usize, other: BlockPos, other_face: Face, pull: bool },
        ReadSignal { face: Face, register: RegisterId, success: ScriptLabel },
        ReadSignalBlock { face: Face, register: RegisterId },
        ReadLogic { face: Face, register: RegisterId },
        WriteSignal { face: Face, value: RegisterOrImmediate },
        WriteValue { face: Face, value: RegisterOrImmediate },
        GetSlotItemCount { slot: RegisterOrImmediate, register: RegisterId },
        MoveItem { from_view: usize, to_view: usize },
        Craft {
            recipes: KeyGroup<RecipeData>,
            input_view: usize,
            output_view: usize,
            speed: f32,
        },
    }
    impl ExternalScriptByteCode for MachineInstrution {
        fn parse<'a>(
            opcode: &'a str,
            arguments: &[&'a str],
            parse_context: &mut ScriptParseContext,
        ) -> Result<Self, ScriptParseError<'a>> {
            let parse_face = |input: &str| -> Result<Face, ScriptParseError<'static>> {
                Ok(
                    match input {
                        "front" => Face::Front,
                        "back" => Face::Back,
                        "left" => Face::Left,
                        "right" => Face::Right,
                        "up" => Face::Up,
                        "down" => Face::Down,
                        other => {
                            return Err(ScriptParseError::ExternalError {
                                line: parse_context.current_line_num,
                                error: ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("expected face, got {0}", other),
                                    )
                                }),
                            });
                        }
                    },
                )
            };
            Ok(
                match opcode {
                    "next" => MachineInstrution::Next,
                    "sleep" => {
                        expect_argument_count(
                            parse_context.current_line_num,
                            arguments,
                            2,
                        )?;
                        let sleep_time = arguments[0].parse().unwrap();
                        MachineInstrution::Sleep {
                            time: sleep_time,
                        }
                    }
                    "suspend" => MachineInstrution::Suspend,
                    "transfer_pull" | "transfer_push" => {
                        expect_argument_count(
                            parse_context.current_line_num,
                            arguments,
                            5,
                        )?;
                        let x = arguments[1].parse().unwrap();
                        let y = arguments[2].parse().unwrap();
                        let z = arguments[3].parse().unwrap();
                        MachineInstrution::TranferItem {
                            self_view: arguments[0].parse().unwrap(),
                            other: BlockPos { x, y, z },
                            other_face: parse_face(arguments[4])?,
                            pull: match opcode {
                                "transfer_pull" => true,
                                "transfer_push" => false,
                                _ => {
                                    ::core::panicking::panic(
                                        "internal error: entered unreachable code",
                                    )
                                }
                            },
                        }
                    }
                    "get_slot_item_count" => {
                        expect_argument_count(
                            parse_context.current_line_num,
                            arguments,
                            2,
                        )?;
                        MachineInstrution::GetSlotItemCount {
                            slot: parse_context.parse_value(arguments[1]),
                            register: parse_context.parse_register(arguments[0]),
                        }
                    }
                    _ => {
                        return Err(ScriptParseError::UnknownOpCode {
                            line: parse_context.current_line_num,
                            opcode,
                        });
                    }
                },
            )
        }
    }
    pub enum BlockMachineFace {
        InventoryAccess {
            #[serde(default)]
            input: InventoryView,
            #[serde(default)]
            output: InventoryView,
        },
        LogicInput,
        LogicOutput,
        SignalInput,
        SignalOutput,
        Empty,
    }

    pub type BlockKey = Key<BlockData>;
    pub type BlockPalette = PaletteVec<
        BlockEntry,
        HybridPalette<16, BlockEntry>,
        AlignedIndexBuffer,
    >;
    pub struct BlockEntry {
        pub block: BlockKey,
        #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "skip_if_default")]
        pub color: BlockColor,
        #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "skip_if_default")]
        pub rotation: BlockRotation,
        #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "skip_if_default")]
        pub state: u16,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for BlockEntry {}
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialEq for BlockEntry {
        #[inline]
        fn eq(&self, other: &BlockEntry) -> bool {
            self.state == other.state && self.block == other.block
                && self.color == other.color && self.rotation == other.rotation
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::Eq for BlockEntry {
        #[inline]
        #[doc(hidden)]
        #[coverage(off)]

            let _: ::core::cmp::AssertParamIsEq<BlockKey>;
            let _: ::core::cmp::AssertParamIsEq<BlockColor>;
            let _: ::core::cmp::AssertParamIsEq<BlockRotation>;
            let _: ::core::cmp::AssertParamIsEq<u16>;
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::hash::Hash for BlockEntry {
        #[inline]

            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.block, state);
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.color, state);
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.rotation, state);
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.state, state)
        }
    }

                    &mut __serde_state,

                        &self.color,
                    )?;
                } else {

                        &mut __serde_state,
                        "color",
                    )?;
                }
                if !skip_if_default(&self.rotation) {

                        &mut __serde_state,
                        "rotation",
                        &self.rotation,
                    )?;
                } else {

                        "rotation",
                    )?;

    impl BlockEntry {
        pub fn simple(block: BlockKey) -> BlockEntry {
            BlockEntry {
                block,
                color: Default::default(),
                rotation: Default::default(),
                state: Default::default(),
            }
        }
        pub fn colliders(&self, position: BlockPos) -> impl Iterator<Item = AABB<f32>> {
            self.block
                .data()
                .collision
                .iter()
                .map(move |collider| {
                    self.rotation.rotate_aabb(*collider).offset(position.to_pos())
                })
        }
    }
    pub fn skip_if_default<T: Default + PartialEq>(value: &T) -> bool {
        *value == T::default()
    }
    impl Default for BlockRotation {
        fn default() -> Self {
            BlockRotation::from(Orientation::IDENTITY)
        }
    }
    impl Into<Orientation> for BlockRotation {
        fn into(self) -> Orientation {
            Orientation::all()[self.0 as usize]
        }
    }
    impl From<Orientation> for BlockRotation {
        fn from(value: Orientation) -> Self {
            BlockRotation(
                Orientation::all()
                    .iter()
                    .position(|orientation| *orientation == value)
                    .unwrap() as u8,
            )
        }
    }

    impl BlockRotation {
        pub fn rotate_aabb(self, aabb: AABB<f32>) -> AABB<f32> {
            let aabb = aabb.offset(Vec3::all(-0.5));
            let orientation: Orientation = self.into();
            AABB::bound(
                    [
                        orientation.rotate_pos(aabb.min),
                        orientation
                            .rotate_pos(Vec3 {
                                x: aabb.max.x,
                                y: aabb.min.y,
                                z: aabb.min.z,
                            }),
                        orientation
                            .rotate_pos(Vec3 {
                                x: aabb.min.x,
                                y: aabb.max.y,
                                z: aabb.min.z,
                            }),
                        orientation
                            .rotate_pos(Vec3 {
                                x: aabb.min.x,
                                y: aabb.min.y,
                                z: aabb.max.z,
                            }),
                    ]
                        .into_iter(),
                )
                .unwrap()
                .offset(Vec3::all(0.5))
        }
    }

    impl Into<Color> for BlockColor {
        fn into(self) -> Color {
            Color {
                r: ((self.0 & 31) << 3) as u8,
                g: (((self.0 >> 5) & 31) << 3) as u8,
                b: (((self.0 >> 10) & 31) << 3) as u8,
                a: 255,
            }
        }
    }
    impl Default for BlockColor {
        fn default() -> Self {
            Self(2 ^ 15 - 1)
        }
    }
    static IMAGE_CACHE: OnceLock<Mutex<HashMap<TextureKey, Arc<DynamicImage>>>> = OnceLock::new();
    fn image_cache() -> MutexGuard<'static, HashMap<TextureKey, Arc<DynamicImage>>> {
        IMAGE_CACHE.get_or_init(|| Mutex::new(HashMap::new())).lock().unwrap()
    }
    pub struct TextureData {
        pub texture: Arc<DynamicImage>,
    }
    pub type TextureKey = Key<TextureData>;
    impl RegistryConfigLoadable for TextureData {
        fn registry_load_from_config(
            config: &Path,
            key: Key<Self>,
        ) -> anyhow::Result<TextureData> {
            let texture = match config.extension().unwrap().to_str().unwrap() {
                "png" => Arc::new(image::open(config)?),
                "ron" => {
                    let texture = ron::from_str::<
                        ComposedTexture,
                    >(std::fs::read_to_string(config)?.as_str())?;
                    texture.resolve(config.parent().unwrap())
                }
                _ => ::core::panicking::panic("explicit panic"),
            };
            image_cache().insert(key, texture.clone());
            Ok(TextureData { texture })
        }
    }
    enum ComposedTexture {
        Image(TextureKey),
        Overlay { base: Box<ComposedTexture>, overlay: Box<ComposedTexture> },
        Color { base: Box<ComposedTexture>, color: Color },
    }

    };
    impl ComposedTexture {
        pub fn resolve(&self, texture_path: &Path) -> Arc<DynamicImage> {
            match self {
                ComposedTexture::Image(key) => {
                    if let Some(image) = image_cache().get(key) {
                        return Arc::clone(image);
                    }
                    TextureData::registry_load_from_config(key.path(), *key)
                        .unwrap()
                        .texture
                }
                ComposedTexture::Overlay { base, overlay } => {
                    let mut base = Arc::unwrap_or_clone(base.resolve(texture_path));
                    let overlay = overlay.resolve(texture_path);
                    overlay_dyn_img(
                        &mut base,
                        &overlay,
                        0,
                        0,
                        image_overlay::BlendMode::Normal,
                    );
                    Arc::new(base)
                }
                ComposedTexture::Color { base, color } => {
                    let mut base = Arc::unwrap_or_clone(base.resolve(texture_path));
                    let mut base = base.to_rgba8();
                    for pixel in base.pixels_mut() {
                        for (i, v) in Into::<[u8; 4]>::into(*color)
                            .into_iter()
                            .enumerate()
                        {
                            let p = pixel.0[i] as u16 * v as u16;
                            pixel.0[i] = ((p + 1 + (p >> 8)) >> 8) as u8;
                        }
                    }
                    Arc::new(base.into())
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pub struct EntityData {
        pub hitbox_size: f32,
        pub hitbox_height: f32,
        #[serde(default)]
        pub eye_height: f32,
        pub model: ModelInstance,
        #[serde(default)]
        pub interact_action: EntityInteractAction,
        pub health: f32,
        #[serde(default)]
        pub damage_table: DamageTable,
        #[serde(default)]
        pub ai_tasks: Vec<MobAiTask>,
    }

        non_upper_case_globals,
        unused_attributes,
        unused_qualifications,
        clippy::absolute_paths,
    )]

    impl EntityData {
        pub fn hitbox(&self) -> AABB<f32> {
            AABB {
                min: Pos {
                    x: -self.hitbox_size,
                    y: 0.,
                    z: -self.hitbox_size,
                },
                max: Pos {
                    x: self.hitbox_size,
                    y: self.hitbox_height,
                    z: self.hitbox_size,
                },
            }
        }
    }

    impl BiomeNoiseConfig {
        pub fn get_error(&self, value: f32) -> f32 {

    pub struct ModelData {
        pub model: Model,
    }
    pub type ModelKey = Key<ModelData>;
    impl RegistryConfigLoadable for ModelData {
        fn registry_load_from_config(
            config: &Path,
            key: Key<Self>,
        ) -> anyhow::Result<Self> {
            let json = std::fs::read_to_string(config)
                .map_err(|_| ::anyhow::__private::must_use({
                    let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                        format_args!("error loading"),
                    );
                    error
                }))?;
            Ok(ModelData {
                model: serde_json::from_str(&json)
                    .map_err(|err| ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                        ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                            ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                format_args!("error loading {0:?}", err),
                            )
                        }),
                    ))?,
            })
        }
    }
    pub struct ModelInstance {
        pub model: ModelKey,
        pub textures: Vec<TextureKey>,
    }
    impl<'de> Deserialize<'de> for ModelInstance {
        fn deserialize<D>(deserializer: D) -> Result<Self, D::Error>
        where
            D: serde::Deserializer<'de>,
        {
            struct ModelInstanceVisitor;
            impl<'de> Visitor<'de> for ModelInstanceVisitor {
                type Value = ModelInstance;
                fn expecting(
                    &self,
                    formatter: &mut std::fmt::Formatter,
                ) -> std::fmt::Result {
                    formatter.write_str("valid model")
                }
                fn visit_str<E>(self, v: &str) -> Result<Self::Value, E>
                where
                    E: serde::de::Error,
                {
                    let mut split = v.split(";");
                    let model = split.next().unwrap();
                    let model = ModelKey::id(model)
                        .ok_or_else(|| {
                            serde::de::Error::custom(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("model {0} not found", model),
                                    )
                                }),
                            )
                        })?;
                    Ok(ModelInstance {
                        model,
                        textures: split
                            .map(|texture| {
                                TextureKey::id(texture)
                                    .ok_or_else(|| {
                                        serde::de::Error::custom(
                                            ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                                    format_args!("texture {0} not found", texture),
                                                )
                                            }),
                                        )
                                    })
                            })
                            .collect::<Result<Vec<TextureKey>, E>>()?,
                    })
                }
            }
            deserializer.deserialize_str(ModelInstanceVisitor)
        }
    }
    pub struct TranslationLanguageData {
        pub translations: HashMap<String, String>,
    }
    impl TranslationLanguageData {
        pub fn translate<'a>(&'a self, key: &'a str) -> &'a str {
            self.translations.get(key).map(|s| s.as_str()).unwrap_or(key)
        }
    }
    impl RegistryConfigLoadable for TranslationLanguageData {
        fn registry_load_from_config(
            config: &Path,
            key: Key<Self>,
        ) -> anyhow::Result<Self> {
            let mut translation = TranslationLanguageData {
                translations: HashMap::new(),
            };
            for line in std::fs::read_to_string(config).unwrap().lines() {
                let (key, value) = line.split_once("=").unwrap();
                translation
                    .translations
                    .insert(key.trim().to_string(), value.trim().to_string());
            }
            Ok(translation)
        }
    }
